description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull requests to the main and vnext branches. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: test, examples, notebooks, and array_api_tests. The test job runs on a matrix of OS, Python versions, and configurations, checking out the repository, setting up micromamba, installing the package, and running tests. The examples and notebooks jobs build and install Sparse, then run example scripts. The array_api_tests job runs array-api-tests for Numba and Finch backends.
